headerTitle: Founding Engineer  ·  Aesthetic Enterprises  ·  Multi-Location Aesthetics Platform  ·  Remote
intro: 13 production platforms built solo. Square, GoHighLevel, Twilio, Stripe, custom analytics dashboards pulling from multi-source POS and CRM data — I’ve integrated all of it. The role you’ve described is the exact founding engineering engagement I run: assess the real problem, own the build, ship to production, drive adoption across a non-technical team.
bullets: Unified analytics from multi-source operational data — built dashboards consolidating heterogeneous data across booking systems, POS-equivalent financial data, CRM pipelines, and marketing platforms into a single source of truth. Ran this across six client engagements in roofing, home services, entertainment, and SaaS — the 40-location Square + GoHighLevel consolidation architecture is a familiar pattern.

Full-stack generalist + AI-augmented development — React/Next.js 15 front-end, Node.js/Python back-end, PostgreSQL, REST API design, and SaaS integration wiring. Daily Claude Code CLI user — this is my primary engineering environment, not a credential. Ship full platforms in 6-week windows. Wire up API integrations, build dashboards, and deploy backends in the same week without context-switching cost.

Workflow automation at operational scale — built Twilio IVR flows, Sinch SMS campaigns, BullMQ drip engines, and cron-based automation pipelines across multiple production platforms. Zapier/n8n/Make integration pattern fluency. All six client engagements were direct founder-to-engineer: assess actual needs vs. assumed ones, propose the architecture, own the build, hand off a running system.
closingLine: Available immediately. Remote (TX-based, US Central). Ready to start with the analytics dashboard.
matchNotes: Founding engineer at multi-location aesthetics platform. 6 FDE engagements + multi-source analytics builds + daily AI-augmented dev = strong match. $140K is at floor. Remote is ideal. Direct founder working model matches Will's entire pattern.
